meta.title: Spreading And Sharing The Risk
meta.description: Insurance does not reduce overall market or sector risk. It spreads it amongst participants.  The strategic benefits from risk sharing are more clearly understood when you unpack the cyber insurance business.  Michael Gaudet has first hand experience in cyber insurance for OT systems and will describe how this has been successful, and not, as well as provide his views on how this will progress as this newer insurance product matures.
